body:
I released a new patch version of ClimaCalibrate, and the calibration tests need a compat to ensure they get the correct verison.

I also added `job_id` as an exception for unused keys in the AtmosConfig.
title: Fix ClimaCalibrate compat

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Allows single column model to be run to the top of the atmosphere using forcing from a gcm file. 

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->
Need to generalize to any cfsite - maybe do this as command line arg? 
Make experiment more physical

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
with @szy21 and @costachris

title: adds forcing from GCM for full-depth profile scm runs
